project_type: Next.js + TypeScript dashboard app with BullMQ pipeline worker
build_system: npm + Docker compose (Dockerfile.worker for the worker process)
verification_instructions: 1. Run tsc --noEmit to verify types. 2. Run jest to verify tests. 3. Run git push. 4. SSH to VPS, git pull, docker compose build. 5. Trigger a run via curl.
setup_instructions: npm ci in the project root
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. VPS at 35.255.81.115 (user: aichaguimaoune, pass: Hamza@19951995). GitHub push available.
contribution_requirements: Commit to main branch, push, rebuild on VPS with docker compose
key_patterns: Pipeline worker fetches data from MCPs (COD leads/orders, LF orders, tracking), runs reconciliation engine that produces 45-column RowData[] arrays, then calls buildDashboardHtml(). The reference dashboard expects a JSON array of objects with 34 fields per row, gzipped and base64-encoded as a PAY constant in the HTML.
directory_structure: src/lib/dashboard-builder.ts - the file to rewrite. src/workers/pipeline.worker.ts - calls buildDashboardHtml with config including reconciliationResult. src/lib/reconciliation/ - reconciliation engine producing rows with 45 columns.
